name: KITS Guntur Autonomous Campus Portal
description: A premium, full-stack Academic & Institutional Management portal designed for KITS Guntur. Features high-performance multi-role RBAC dashboards for students, lecturers, and admins, real-time Firestore synchronization, AI-powered AeroAdvisor, dynamic interactive campus galleries, and an integrated Webhook Receiver Hub for external IoT and RFID sensors.
